# TurtleBot3 mesh subset

This directory contains the pre-converted TurtleBot3 Burger mesh assets from
Unity Technologies' Robotics Nav2 SLAM Example:

- Source: https://github.com/Unity-Technologies/Robotics-Nav2-SLAM-Example
- Source revision: `a0c9846eaa04f4800d3521639990e74c3b287ceb`
- Upstream component: ROBOTIS TurtleBot3
- License: Apache License 2.0
- Copyright: 2016 ROBOTIS Co.

Only the Burger base, wheel, and LDS mesh assets and their Unity prefabs are
included. The legacy ROS-TCP scripts and project configuration are excluded.
See `Third Party Notices.md` and `LICENSE.md` in this directory.
